description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a heavily armored, angular exterior with a matte black finish, designed for urban combat and high-threat environments. The body is constructed with sloped, faceted armor panels that provide both ballistic protection and a stealthy appearance. The vehicle has a low, wide stance with four large, rugged off-road tires, each with deep treads for enhanced traction on various surfaces. The cockpit is protected by thick, multi-faceted windows, and the roof is equipped with visible mounts for weaponry, including a prominent machine gun mount. The rear of the vehicle features reinforced armor and a large exhaust port, suggesting a powerful engine. Overall, the design emphasizes survivability, mobility, and offensive capability in urban scenarios.
description: A matte black, heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with angular panels, large off-road tires, and visible weapon mounts, built for urban operations.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular armor, two large rugged tires, faceted windows, and a roof-mounted weapon system.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped armor, reinforced front end, and wide stance with two large front tires.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same angular armor and window design, with clear visibility of the rear tire and weapon mount.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the reinforced back armor, dual rear tires, and a large central exhaust port.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible machine gun mount on the roof, positioned centrally above the cockpit.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped, faceted armor panels; reinforced front and rear sections; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte black color; no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, aggressive tread pattern; appear reinforced for urban and rough terrain.
